name: Abyss Actors Back Stage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>楽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>屋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>や</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>入</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り
desc: If you have 2 "Abyss Actor" cards in your Pendulum Zones: Add 2 "Abyss Actor" Pendulum Monsters with different names from your Deck to your Extra Deck face-up. You can only activate 1 "Abyss Actors Back Stage" per turn.
eff: If you have 2 "Abyss Actor" cards in your Pendulum Zones: Add 2 "Abyss Actor" Pendulum Monsters with different names from your Deck to your Extra Deck face-up. You can only activate 1 "Abyss Actors Back Stage" per turn.

action: Adds from Deck to Extra Deck
